summaryForNext: Build-vs-adopt: BUILD/wire all 3 goals, ZERO new dependencies (library-candidates.json is build_required[] only; no adopt/adapt). Design decisions RESOLVED: D1 (G3, SAFETY-CRITICAL) add a sleep_until(nearest pending expires_at) arm to the paused-stream select! (pipeline.rs:815-833); on fire AUTO-DENY the held call (emit deny event + resume stream to termination, NOT silent drop) — reuse the monotonic PendingApproval.expires_at Instant; mirrors the cancel arm + the in-tree watchdog interval (pipeline.rs:744). D2 (G3) spawn a background tokio::time::interval janitor calling ApprovalManager::purge_expired() (defined but never called), started in main.rs. D3 (G3) add approval:{enabled:bool=true, ttl_seconds:Option<u64>} to config/types.rs (serde default); enabled:false -> RequireApproval fails closed to Deny (kill-switch). D4 (G2) add ApprovalManager::list()->Vec<ApprovalStatus> (skip expired; ApprovalStatus already Serialize) + GET /approvals + GET /approvals/{id}. D5 (G2) new /approvals web tab (App.tsx route+nav, pages/Approvals.tsx, client fns/hooks/types) following AgentIdentities/Policies pattern + TanStack Query refetchInterval poll + approve/deny -> POST /approvals/{id}/decision. D6 multi-replica = documented single-replica constraint this phase (ApprovalManager is in-memory per-replica; cross-replica routing is a follow-up) — MUST be loudly documented (README+config). D7 in-band client decision channel = OUT of scope (REST+UI suffices). BUILD ORDER INVERTS THE SEED: G3 first (close the fail-open-to-hang), then G2, then G1 (comment fix ag_ui.rs:245/a2ui.rs:140 + verification test). Each change touches approval/stream/authz -> separated security review each; D1's auto-deny (fail-closed, emit-deny-not-silent-drop, no half-open stream leak) is the highest-priority security item. Watch-items: D1 deadline recomputation after each resolve (test staggered pending approvals); D3 enabled:false must deny not allow. Federate any JWKS IdM (Ory ref) never an IdP; admin 4457 stays private; LLM-ops out of scope. Open for Spec: exact deadline source (nearest-expires_at recomputed vs per-approval timer map — lean nearest); janitor interval (fixed 60s vs TTL-derived); Approvals tab shows pending-only vs incl decided (lean pending-only, decided is in the authz audit trail).
